summary: Pending review of both Phase 5 (redundancy) and Phase 6 (uncertainty). Spec 05 acceptance criteria added. Awaiting UnRalph review.

criteria.name: PCA Method
criteria.requirement: Must use sklearn.decomposition.PCA on real station data, produce component loadings and explained variance ratio. Test must verify PCA output shape and variance structure.

criteria.name: Clustering Method
criteria.requirement: Must use real sklearn clustering algorithm (AgglomerativeClustering or KMeans). Sorting does NOT satisfy this. Distance metric must be appropriate for correlation structure. Test must verify intra-cluster similarity.

criteria.name: Stanhope Benchmark
criteria.requirement: Must statistically compare park stations against ECCC Stanhope reference. Per-station similarity scores. Real data, not synthetic. Test must verify Stanhope comparison output exists.

criteria.name: Recommendation Synthesis
criteria.requirement: Recommendations must combine PCA, clustering, AND benchmarking evidence. Not based on single metric. Per-station keep/remove/defer with evidence citations. Test must verify at least two methods referenced.

criteria.name: Test Quality (Redundancy)
criteria.requirement: Tests must use real project data or documented synthetic mimicking real structure. Must verify behavior (correct clustering, correct PCA), not just file existence. pytest tests/test_redundancy.py must pass.

criteria.name: Probabilistic Method
criteria.requirement: Must use scipy.stats.gaussian_kde on real station observations. Heuristic score does NOT satisfy this.
criteria.evidence: Previous review: KDE applied to heuristic-generated linspace, not real data. Awaiting re-review of commit 2e19abf.

criteria.name: Station-Removal Risk
criteria.requirement: Per-station removal risk tied to benchmark evidence.
criteria.evidence: Per-station output with station, reference_station, risk_probability, ci_lower, ci_upper.

criteria.name: Confidence Intervals
criteria.requirement: Confidence intervals must widen with fewer data points.
criteria.evidence: Quantiles from KDE sample. Test verifies interval width increases as overlap_count decreases.

criteria.name: Assumptions and Limitations
criteria.requirement: Must include reliability flag for insufficient data, avoid false precision.

criteria.name: Integration with Recommendations
criteria.requirement: Uncertainty outputs integrated into final recommendations.
criteria.evidence: risk_probability, ci_lower, ci_upper, risk_band integrated into recommendation output.

criteria.name: Test Quality (Uncertainty)
criteria.requirement: Tests must verify distributional behavior on real data, not just column existence.
criteria.evidence: Previous review: tests too weak. Awaiting re-review of commit 2e19abf.
